title: San Francisco Demands Apple and Google Remove AI Nudity Apps
subtitle: City officials take a firm stand against technology used to create non-consensual sexual images.

summary.en: San Francisco’s attorney general has ordered Apple and Google to remove 13 apps that use AI to create fake nude photos. These tools allow users to alter images of real people without their permission. Officials argue that these apps violate state laws and cause serious harm to victims. While Google has already removed the flagged apps, the city continues to pressure tech giants to do more. This move highlights the growing struggle to control harmful AI content online.
summary.zh: 舊金山市檢察長已下令蘋果與谷歌移除 13 款利用人工智慧製作虛假裸照的應用程式。這些工具讓使用者能在未經許可的情況下，竄改真實人物的影像。官員主張，這些應用程式違反了州法律，並對受害者造成嚴重傷害。儘管谷歌已移除被點名的應用程式，但市府仍持續向這些科技巨頭施壓，要求採取更多作為。此舉凸顯了在網路上管控有害人工智慧內容的挑戰正日益嚴峻。

paragraphs.en: San Francisco’s attorney general, David Chiu, has taken a major step to stop the spread of harmful technology. This week, his office sent official letters to Apple and Google, ordering them to remove 13 specific mobile applications from their digital stores. These apps use artificial intelligence (AI) to create fake, sexualized images of real people. According to reports from Wired, these tools allow users to easily remove clothing from photos, change a person’s features, or place someone’s face onto a naked body without their consent.
paragraphs.zh: 舊金山市檢察長邱信福（David Chiu）已採取重大行動，以遏止有害科技的散布。本週，他的辦公室向蘋果（Apple）與谷歌（Google）發出正式信函，要求這兩家公司將 13 款特定的行動應用程式從其數位商店中下架。這些應用程式利用人工智慧（AI）製作真實人物的虛假色情影像。根據《連線》（Wired）雜誌報導，這些工具讓使用者能輕易地將照片中的衣物移除、改變人物特徵，或在未經當事人同意的情況下，將他人的臉部合成到裸體影像上。

paragraphs.en: This action follows recent efforts by the city to address the rise of what are often called “nudification” apps. These tools have become increasingly common, and officials are concerned about the speed at which they are spreading. In his letters to the tech companies, Chiu warned that the app stores are violating California laws. These laws prohibit services that help create deepfake pornography—a term used for realistic but fake sexual images or videos created by AI. According to Wired, Chiu expressed that his office was deeply disturbed by how these tools are used to target women and children.
paragraphs.zh: 此舉是該市近期為解決所謂「裸體化」應用程式氾濫問題所做的努力之一。這類工具日益普及，官員們對於其擴散速度感到憂心。邱信福在致科技公司的信中警告，這些應用程式商店的行為已違反加州法律。這些法律禁止提供協助製作「深偽色情」（deepfake pornography）的服務，這是指利用人工智慧製作出逼真但虛假的色情圖片或影片。據《連線》報導，邱信福表示，對於這些工具被用來針對婦女與兒童進行攻擊，他的辦公室深感不安。

paragraphs.en: For many victims, the impact is severe. Chiu explained to Wired that these images are used to bully, humiliate, and threaten people. The consequences go far beyond a simple digital prank; they can ruin a person’s reputation and cause serious damage to their mental health. In some cases, the harm is so great that victims have felt suicidal. Because of this, Chiu stated that allowing such apps to remain available for download is completely unacceptable. He further noted that Apple and Google have likely earned millions of dollars in fees by hosting these apps, suggesting that the companies have prioritized profit over public safety.
paragraphs.zh: 對許多受害者而言，其影響極為嚴重。邱信福向《連線》解釋，這些影像被用於霸凌、羞辱與威脅他人。其後果遠超乎單純的數位惡作劇；它們可能毀掉一個人的名譽，並對其心理健康造成嚴重損害。在某些案例中，傷害程度之大，甚至導致受害者產生輕生念頭。因此，邱信福指出，允許這類應用程式繼續供人下載是完全無法接受的。他進一步提到，蘋果與谷歌可能已透過託管這些應用程式賺取了數百萬美元的費用，這顯示這些公司將利潤置於公共安全之上。

paragraphs.en: While the names of the 13 apps were not made public to prevent people from searching for them, the scale of the problem is clear. Wired reported that at least one of the apps had been downloaded over a million times. These apps often advertised features that allowed users to create “uncensored” sexual content. By hosting these programs, the city argues that the tech giants have failed to take enough action to protect users from a clear public nuisance.
paragraphs.zh: 雖然這 13 款應用程式的名稱並未公開，以防民眾搜尋，但問題的規模顯而易見。《連線》報導稱，其中至少有一款應用程式的下載次數已超過百萬次。這些應用程式通常會宣傳其功能，聲稱能讓使用者製作「未經審查」的色情內容。舊金山市政府主張，透過託管這些程式，這些科技巨頭未能採取足夠的行動，以保護使用者免受明顯的公共危害。

paragraphs.en: In response to the city’s demands, tech companies have begun to take action. Ars Technica reported that Google spokesperson Dan Jackson confirmed the company has already suspended the five apps that Chiu flagged. Jackson stated that these apps violated Google’s policies against harmful content. He explained that Google Play does not allow apps with sexual material and that the company works to find and remove such content regularly. According to Jackson, Google has already removed hundreds of similar apps and has restricted search terms like “nudify” to prevent users from finding them.
paragraphs.zh: 針對市府的要求，科技公司已開始採取行動。科技新聞網站《Ars Technica》報導，谷歌發言人丹·傑克森（Dan Jackson）證實，該公司已將邱信福點名的五款應用程式停權。傑克森表示，這些應用程式違反了谷歌關於有害內容的政策。他解釋說，Google Play 不允許含有色情素材的應用程式，且公司會定期致力於搜尋並移除此類內容。據傑克森所述，谷歌已移除了數百款類似的應用程式，並限制了如「裸體化」（nudify）等搜尋關鍵字，以防止使用者找到這些程式。

paragraphs.en: This situation highlights a larger debate about the responsibility of major technology platforms. As AI technology becomes more powerful and easier to use, it is becoming harder for companies to monitor what is being created and shared. While Google has taken steps to remove the specific apps mentioned by the attorney general, the city’s move suggests that officials believe more needs to be done. The demand for better detection and stronger rules remains a priority for local governments trying to protect citizens from the dangers of AI-generated content.
paragraphs.zh: 此情況凸顯了關於大型科技平台責任的更廣泛辯論。隨著人工智慧技術變得愈發強大且易於使用，企業要監控內容的產出與分享也變得更加困難。儘管谷歌已採取行動移除檢察長所提到的特定應用程式，但市府的舉措顯示，官員認為仍有更多工作要做。對於試圖保護公民免受人工智慧生成內容危害的地方政府而言，要求更佳的偵測機制與更嚴格的規範，依然是當務之急。

paragraphs.en: As the situation develops, the focus will likely remain on how effectively these companies can police their own stores. For now, the move by San Francisco serves as a warning to the tech industry that the creation of non-consensual intimate images will not be ignored. Whether this leads to permanent changes in how app stores manage AI tools remains to be seen, but it is clear that the pressure on these companies to act is growing stronger.
paragraphs.zh: 隨著事態發展，焦點可能會持續放在這些公司能多有效地管理其商店。目前，舊金山市的舉措對科技產業發出了一項警告：製作未經同意的私密影像行為將不會被忽視。這是否會導致應用程式商店管理人工智慧工具的方式產生永久性改變仍有待觀察，但顯而易見的是，這些公司面臨的行動壓力正日益增強。

keyTerms.definitionEn: To mark or identify something as important, problematic, or requiring attention.
keyTerms.definitionZh: 標記、標示（通常指有問題或需要注意的事項）。
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見作名詞（旗幟），這裡作動詞，指將有問題的應用程式標記出來。文中：Ars Technica reported that Google spokesperson Dan Jackson confirmed the company has already suspended the five apps that Chiu flagged.

keyTerms.definitionEn: To monitor or control a specific area or activity to ensure rules are followed.
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見作名詞（警察），這裡作動詞，指監管應用程式商店的內容。文中：As the situation develops, the focus will likely remain on how effectively these companies can police their own stores.

keyTerms.definitionEn: A person, thing, or situation that causes annoyance or harm to the public.
keyTerms.definitionZh: 騷擾、妨害公眾利益的事物。
keyTerms.noteZh: 此詞在法律語境中常指「妨害公眾安寧或安全的事物」，而不僅僅是日常的「討厭」。文中：By hosting these programs, the city argues that the tech giants have failed to take enough action to protect users from a clear public nuisance.

sources.name: Ars Technica
sources.title: San Francisco orders Apple, Google to remove nudify apps from app stores

previousArticles.title: San Francisco Takes Action Against AI Nudity Apps
previousArticles.summaryEn: San Francisco’s attorney general has ordered Apple and Google to remove 13 apps that use artificial intelligence to create fake nude images. These tools allow users to change photos of real people into sexual content without their permission. Officials argue that these apps cause serious harm to victims, including women and children. Both tech companies have policies against such content, but critics say they have profited from these apps for too long. Google has confirmed that the flagged apps were removed from their store.

quiz.question: What is the primary reason the San Francisco attorney general ordered the removal of the 13 mobile apps?

options.A: The apps were found to be illegally collecting user financial data.
options.B: The apps enable the creation of non-consensual sexual images using AI.
options.C: The developers of the apps refused to pay the required store hosting fees.
options.D: The apps were causing technical malfunctions within the Android and iOS operating systems.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 B。根據文章第一段與第二段，San Francisco 的檢察長 David Chiu 要求移除這些應用程式，是因為這些工具利用 AI 技術，在未經當事人同意下製作虛假的性愛圖像（即 deepfake pornography）。選項 A 文中未提及；選項 C 雖然提到公司透過這些 App 獲利，但並非移除的主因；選項 D 則完全未在文中出現。

quiz.question: Based on the information provided, what can be inferred about the relationship between tech companies and AI-generated content?

options.A: Tech companies have full control over all content created by AI users.
options.B: Tech companies are actively encouraging the creation of deepfake content for profit.
options.C: Tech companies struggle to keep pace with the rapid development and misuse of AI tools.
options.D: Tech companies have already perfected their detection systems to block all harmful AI apps.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 C。文章第六段提到，隨著 AI 技術變得更強大且易於使用，科技公司要監控這些內容變得越來越困難。這暗示了科技公司在應對 AI 濫用問題上處於被動且吃力的狀態。選項 A 與事實不符，公司顯然無法完全控制；選項 B 過於武斷，文中僅提到公司因託管這些 App 而獲利，未說其「鼓勵」製作；選項 D 錯誤，因為文章顯示仍需政府施壓，代表現有防護機制尚不完善。

quiz.question: In the final paragraph, what does the word 'police' mean in the phrase 'how effectively these companies can police their own stores'?

options.A: To call the local law enforcement officers for help.
options.B: To monitor and enforce rules within a specific area.
options.C: To create new laws for the city government.
options.D: To investigate criminal activities in the real world.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 B。在此語境中，police 作為動詞，意指「監督、管理並確保遵守規則」。文章討論的是科技公司如何管理其數位商店內的內容。選項 A 將 police 解釋為報警，不符文意；選項 C 誤將公司角色與政府職能混淆；選項 D 雖然與執法有關，但此處指的是平台內部的審核機制，而非現實世界的刑事調查。

quiz.question: What is the central message of the article?

options.A: The legal battle between Apple and Google over app store fees.
options.B: The technical process of how AI creates deepfake images.
options.C: The increasing pressure on tech companies to take responsibility for harmful AI-generated content.
options.D: The history of how San Francisco became a leader in tech regulation.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 C。全文的核心在於探討科技巨頭在面對 AI 濫用（如 nudification apps）時的責任問題，以及政府如何透過壓力要求這些平台加強監管。選項 A 僅是文中提到的次要細節；選項 B 文中雖有提及，但並非文章主旨；選項 D 則過於誇大，文章僅聚焦於此特定事件，並未討論舊金山在科技法規方面的整體領導地位。
